metadata.note: Human judgments are SYNTHETIC - real RSA requires human annotation

rsa_result.interpretation: WEAK correlation (< 0.3) - embedding space does NOT reflect human perception. Consider alternative embeddings or fine-tuning.

interpretation_full:
============================================================
RSA Results - Embedding vs Human Perception
============================================================
Spearman rho: 0.0004 (p = 9.8867e-01)
Pearson r: -0.0020 (p = 9.4340e-01)
Kendall tau: 0.0010 (p = 9.5728e-01)
Comparisons: 1225

INTERPRETATION:
WEAK correlation (< 0.3) - embedding space does NOT reflect human perception. Consider alternative embeddings or fine-tuning.

------------------------------------------------------------
DECISION: STOP pipeline - embeddings don't reflect human perception
============================================================
